title: DAO Casters Election: Term 1
brief: Per the requirements of PIP-20: Establishment of the DAO Casters Program — Elected Content Creators for Star Atlas Ecosystem Promotion, this is the election PIP for a structured program of 5 elected content creators dedicated to promoting the entire Star Atlas ecosystem.
description:
# DAO Casters Election: Term 1
* Author: Star Atlas DAO Council (SAC-3) 
* PIP Type: Governance 
* Date: Feb 2026
 
___

# SUMMARY

* Per the requirements of [PIP-20: Establishment of the DAO Casters Program — Elected Content Creators for Star Atlas Ecosystem Promotion](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/159cb743-f8cf-4932-8e01-e6f1a0b479ff), this is the election PIP for a structured program of 5 elected content creators dedicated to promoting the entire Star Atlas ecosystem.
* This election PIP will utilize the methodology of [PIP-9: Adjust STV Backup Vote Handling to Prevent Unintended Vote Redistribution](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/1cc4bb6f-269b-46fa-b60b-a17f01b41ffa)
* The top 5 nominees voted for will be elected of the 13 nominees
* DAO Casters Term 1 (DAOC-1) will serve for 3 months (90 days), from April 1, 2026 to May 30, 2026

___

# DAO Caster Nominee List
1. ODVB
2. SpikeCollects
3. Chet Roberts
4. UMG| Cliper
5. Morpheus426
6. Winston7026
7. Azzarycryptearn
8. [NEON] Slika11
9. [Λ] Neo_AArmstrong [EC]
10. Keplernet
11. Funcracker
12. Sakaleynx
13. AlicesArcade 

___

# DAO Caster Nominee Details
### ODVB

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/staratlastv 

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 250,000 

**Motivation for Applying** 
* Wants to do more giveaways and buy a multi-stream subscription.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* Has channels/accounts on X, Facebook, Bluesky, and YouTube/Twitch, and also runs staratlas.shop. 

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* 3–10 hours. 

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They believe the DAO needs to “start selling the dream again.” They want messaging to focus less on “web3, crypto, number go up” and more on why Star Atlas exists—why the universe matters, why POLIS matters, and how a game can be governed by its players. They want more focus on an in-game future where citizens shape the map, laws, and politics of a living world, rather than focusing mainly on farming yield. They also suggest Council rewards should be in-game rather than real-life money, with Councillors earning prestige through titles, influence, and unique opportunities that exist inside Star Atlas. Their overall message is: “Start thinking Star Atlas again. Leave the real world at the gate and build the one we actually care about.” 

**Additional Notes** 
* consistency 

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ACj4qYh8NtE&list=PL4_auqu2sZgDRrtcHnGqrp7LuXitdI8DA

---

### SpikeCollects

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* N/A

**POLIS Voting Power**
* Not mentioned.

**Motivation for Applying** 
* Their skill set is onboarding new creators and communities into crypto.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They run one of the largest web3 gaming communities and advise several projects on creator/community funnels. They are currently promoting Zuni.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They expect to contribute 2–5 hours per week if chosen.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They say the DAO needs more marketing support and help setting up new funnels.

**Additional Notes** 
* They want voters to know that if chosen, they won’t only focus on making content and onboarding their own community, but also extend these opportunities to onboard more creators and communities.

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* https://x.com/spikecollects/status/1953184174791442749?s=46

---

### Chet Roberts

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/BobChester39809

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 150,258

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They are long on Star Atlas, believe in the story, and love being a Star Atlas storyteller.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They have been a content provider on YouTube since July 2007. They have written magazine articles under the name Chet Roberts and have had weekly newspaper columns in several different papers. They are the founder of a hotrod car manufacturer that sells cars around the world with no advertising budget, and they say the company has positive cash flow from content creation featuring their product. They also say they have been paid for personal appearances where they promote their product. They say they bring passion to projects they are involved with and have the ability to inspire others with that passion.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say they spent the past 11 months writing the 1st Chronicles of Chet Roberts and are well into the 2nd Chronicles, and they have spent more hours than they want to calculate involved with Star Atlas and its community. They say their time is very valuable and that approximately $135 per month is not their motivation for submitting the form. They say they will be committed to doing the best job they can if they assume this role.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They say that with the game at its current stage, the focus should be to keep grinding and deliver a good product in the end. They believe positive community members helping and encouraging each other will be best for long-term sustainable growth. They also support using a “big microphone” to tell the story to as many people as often as possible, but think a “concentric circles” approach to spreading the word will probably work best.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say they take their Chet Roberts character very seriously, and through that character they plan on building their Star Atlas business and leaving their “mt iml (in meta life) legacy.”

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* They shared a video about building a giveaway car at a show using students from a tech school. They explain that someone who was instrumental in them going to the show died before the event, and they let his wife start the car. https://youtu.be/sAKJ88q-Zh4?si=xSDctgXRx-UbT_BK
* They also shared a Google Doc and said they have finished their first novel using Galia as a backdrop for the story, that it will be published soon, and asked that the document not be shared. (**Council Note**: The Council can confirm the document exists, but will not share it in order to respect the candidate’s request.)

---

### UMG| Cliper

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/jovanov_boris00

**POLIS Voting Power**
* Not mentioned.

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They answered: “yes.”

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They say they are a beginner and that they stream on YouTube.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* 20 hours.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They suggest more marketing and want the DAO to be listed on bigger crypto exchanges such as Binance and KuCoin.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say they will do their best to create content and to see more of Star Atlas.

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* https://www.youtube.com/@Cliper32

---

### Morpheus426

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/Morpheus_426

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 30,371

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They have been a Star Atlas content creator for the French community since the early “Rebirth” days and see it as a duty and mission. They say they slowed down a lot when the original content creator program went down because they had to make time-based choices. Now that a new program is back, they say they are ready to speed up their work again.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They run a YouTube channel dedicated to Star Atlas called **Star Atlas Froggies**, active since November 2021. They also have two YouTube channels with over 40k subscribers focused on Tai Chi and Qi Gong, plus two business websites for online Tai Chi and Qi Gong classes. They say they created the first website dedicated to Star Atlas during the Rebirth campaign. They describe having strong business experience and skills in digital marketing, content creation, website management, and social media management (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, YouTube). They also say they are an actor and have used that skill in Star Atlas videos, including winning the first short film creation contest for Star Atlas. They also say they won a Joni Award at the inaugural session for their contribution to the French-speaking community.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They are willing to commit 6–8 hours per week, depending heavily on the content type and format. They note that some YouTube videos take half a day, while others take two or three days, depending on the topic and format (podcast, short film, live, tutorial).

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They say the French community currently has almost no content and that they were the only content creator, which creates a lack of tutorials and news updates. They believe the ecosystem needs content that is more attractive and more “mainstream” to make it easier for people to enter the Web3 space. They also say the roleplay element they provided through the Morpheus character created a strong connection for the community and helped people identify with Star Atlas lore.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say they do not hesitate to express critical opinions about the project and value a space where all viewpoints can be voiced. 

**Work Samples / Portfolio**
* https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nM3iLFfZNz8  
* https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V7Kgs-oPtbk

---

### Winston7026

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/Winston_SA

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 1,116,377

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They have wanted to create dedicated Star Atlas content for a long time, but they never had a clear structure or incentive to prioritize it consistently. They say the DAO Caster program provides that framework and makes it realistic to invest the time needed to do it properly. Their planned focus is three formats: practical SAGE tutorials that fill gaps in current content, accessible video essays on the long-term vision of Star Atlas as a metaverse, and short-form lore pieces to help new audiences connect emotionally with the universe. They want to build a small but reliable content pipeline that supports both current players and newcomers.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They have been producing YouTube content for over a decade, mostly gaming-focused and documenting virtual adventures with friends. 
* They list YouTube channels **@reyesbros2362** and **@blocktv3057**. 
* They previously launched a French-language channel for the Life is Feudal games where they created news recaps and tutorials (**@lifeisfeudalfr2369**), and say that experience trained them to simplify complex systems, structure information clearly, and serve a specific language community. They paused that channel due to time constraints but say they are now ready to relaunch a more focused content effort with Star Atlas as the core. They also explored VR streaming and video production, and mention a humorous roundup video about upcoming VR MMORPGs that reached over 20,000 views, though they note that video is no longer on YouTube. They say they have streamed on and off for years and are comfortable with Twitch, YouTube, multi-platform workflows, and OBS Studio. 
* For Star Atlas, they say they were a recurring podcast guest on the French YouTube channel **Star Atlas Froggies** by Morpheus (streams: https://www.youtube.com/@StarAtlasFroggies/streams). 
* They also say they produced a video showing UE5 gameplay (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XKDckBs97y8) and co-hosted the French weekly Atlas Brew on the Star Atlas Discord server. They say these experiences give them confidence on camera, a clear sense of what the francophone audience needs, and a foundation to deliver consistent SAGE tutorials, ecosystem updates, and accessible formats for new players.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say they are not currently producing consistent Star Atlas content. If selected, they will commit a minimum of 10 hours per week with a steady output goal, prioritizing quality and a sustainable cadence rather than sporadic bursts. 

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They believe onboarding content is an area where improvement can happen quickly. They say new players still struggle to find clear, up-to-date SAGE guides that are short and practical. They believe growth is not only marketing, but also reducing friction, and say the fastest win is making the first two hours of discovery feel understandable, rewarding, and shareable. They want to contribute by producing tutorial content designed like a “starter path,” not isolated videos.
* They also say the collaboration with Wilder World felt like the right kind of signal because it shows Star Atlas is thinking beyond a single ecosystem, and they would like to see that approach pushed further with deeper, story-driven and gameplay-adjacent partnerships across Web3 and adjacent sci-fi communities.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say they will produce content in French with an English dub recorded by themselves. They plan to cover SAGE tutorials, long-term vision essays, and lore-driven shorts that can reach new audiences through short-form platforms. Their goal is to make Star Atlas easier to enter, easier to understand, and more exciting to follow week after week.

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* Life is Feudal beginners guide: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CiY-fumaGVM

---

### Azzarycryptearn

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/azzaryce?s=21&t=jlJjPhHghH1xsH3nCNYHnw

**POLIS Voting Power**
* They say they still don’t have staked POLIS.

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They are passionate about helping the community understand and participate in governance. They say the DAO is one of the most unique parts of Star Atlas, and they want to contribute by breaking down proposals, decisions, and ecosystem developments in a clear and engaging way.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They say they have been involved in Web3 communities for several years, including participating in governance, moderating Discord servers, and helping onboard new users.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They estimate 3–5 hours per week and say they are willing to commit more if needed.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They believe the most important focus is lowering the barrier to entry while amplifying the strongest parts of the experience. They point to strengths they see as already being done well, including high-quality worldbuilding and assets, transparent communication from the team, real gameplay progress, and more. They also want more creator tooling and content amplification, simplified onboarding for new players, and a stronger presence in gaming communities.

**Additional Notes** 
* They want people to know they are consistent and dependable. They say that if chosen, they will show up, deliver high-quality updates, and stay committed to keeping the community informed. They also say they have not created a project yet, and that they are currently a stage operator on the Clash of Titans race and working on that. 

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* They did not give one

---

### [NEON] Slika11

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/slika_11

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 453,568

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They want a way to make their passion more real and become a full-time content creator.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They say they have a YouTube channel and a Twitch channel, and that they are small but will be very active. They say they have the NEON Army as background support to help promote their content. They mention skills in video editing and livestreaming. They say they can speak German and English, which they see as good for German representation. They also say they are an active player in Labs and UE5.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say they have currently left their job and want to go deeper into this, aiming for daily work of at least 6 hours, including weekends.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They say the game is good but needs more different things to do. They believe onboarding is easy because of Epic Games and the Solana chain, and they think z.ink will be as easy as Solana. They say they can help with German translations if needed. They say shooter and racing are good and should be grown further. They also want more types of rewards, not only ink, giving the example of different colors like blue ink, red ink, or black ink, and they say this would fit C4 resources. They suggest implementing Labs in Epic and only there, so players can access it that way, and they mention automation still with tools but UE5 being needed, which they believe would bring more traffic.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say they like helping new gamers get into the game and “take them by the hand,” and that they are very competitive.

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* They say their content is on their X, Twitch (twitch.tv/slika11), and YouTube. They also say their tutorials are currently private for the NEON Army because the quality is not where they want it yet due to lack of time.

---

### [Λ] Neo_AArmstrong [EC]

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/Neo_Aarmstrong

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 65,592

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They have been creating content for the Brazilian Star Atlas community for over two years, and say that being an official content creator directly linked to Star Atlas would be more than an honor.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They say they started creating content in 2021 through livestreams of Web3 games, and since then have consistently created content related to Web3 games, especially Star Atlas. They say they are 100% focused on Star Atlas, but that this gives them fewer marketing opportunities. They say they have participated in some community tournaments. They also say they have been trying to create events for the Brazilian community, with prize distribution and free participation from other creators to promote Star Atlas.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say they currently spend 3–4 hours a day studying the economy and the game as a whole, and produce 2–3 weekly livestreams that each last 1–3 hours. They also say that every 15 days, they and ZeSKK host “Café com Atlas,” the Brazilian/Portuguese version of Brew, covering bi-weekly project news. They believe they can expand their time to 5–6 hours a day.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They believe the best way to grow is through marketing and say Star Atlas has been trying to run marketing campaigns with creators and participate in events since z.ink arrived, but still needs more visibility. They say advertisements would help, but believe the current state of the game does not allow that yet. They suggest focusing on product development while keeping the internal community engaged, and then expanding content creation and attracting external audiences once the game is engaging and fun.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say Star Atlas is not just a game but their passion, and that they dedicate their free time to studying the project to bring the most didactic and complete content possible. If elected, they intend to expand their research further by diving deeper into the economy and ecosystem to produce richer content. They also say they are a big fan of DACs that keep the project alive, especially those active in UE5, and they intend to bring constant racing and Surge events to keep the community active. 

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLc40pRMJePI77H2GzD9mplGhTazdrISER  
* https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLc40pRMJePI4uL7pxRZOig9n_r0iZfio2

---

### Keplernet

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/keplernett

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 11,000

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They have been streaming Star Atlas content for around four years and say they like Star Atlas, the community, and sharing information and analysis while having fun together. They see this program as a good opportunity to do it in a more official way, with DAO support, and to collaborate with other Star Atlas creators.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They say they have been streaming Star Atlas content for around four years and enjoy sharing information and analysis with the community and having fun together.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say it depends on the type of content or streaming program. They explain that informational content can take several hours of preparation plus a few hours of livestreaming, and they have sometimes done 4-hour streams. They also say they have not been producing as much content lately but want to regain momentum, and see this program as a good chance to do that.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They think more UE5 gameplay releases would be the biggest factor to attract more people. They also suggest having a more fun and more agile or faster strategy game, like SAGE or Holosim, but with more things happening. For content, they say it should engage the community through live debate with chat, giveaways, and similar interaction.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say they have been in the community since the beginning through both good and bad times. They say they were the first to translate major Star Atlas events live into Spanish, such as Townhalls, and that their long streams helped create friendships and stronger community feeling. They want to continue this work in a more official way. They also say they created a couple of UE5 environments for short news videos and for a long ship information competition they ran, including a ship ranking voted on by them and viewers.

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5_vivphP8yQ

---

### Funcracker

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/ronaldtreur

**POLIS Voting Power**
* Not mentioned.

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They want to promote the role itself, highlight written content as an often overlooked form of creation, and make more people aware of the Star Atlas newsletter they publish every Monday. They also say they do not usually collaborate when creating content and want to explore collaboration.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They say they have worked across multiple angles as a guild founder and as an active and knowledgeable community member. They say they write guides and newsletters, organize the yearly Checkpoint talk show, organize events, and occasionally interview team members (though they note it has been a while). They also say they try to grow the ecosystem through these efforts and regularly present, and “semi-represent,” Star Atlas during live events.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say it is difficult to estimate, but at least 6 hours.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They say the DAO Casters initiative is a great step. Beyond this, they believe the community should create a regular, recurring show that follows Star Atlas development, similar to how Star Citizen covers its development. They say the team lacks the capacity to do this, so they believe it is up to the community.

**Additional Notes** 
* They encourage people to vote for trusted news sources. They also say that if voters are choosing between them and someone else, they should not feel bad voting for the other person, and that they are not going anywhere.

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* https://aephia.com/star-atlas-newsletters/

---

### Sakaleynx

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/sakaleynx

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 68,515 (68.5K)

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They say content creation has always been a dream, and that Star Atlas lets them live that dream while genuinely enjoying making content about the game. They also say they are a Star Atlas content creator.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They say they are an active member of the Turkish community and the Coexist team, and have been producing Star Atlas content for seven months. They publish content on X and YouTube, and say they mainly do livestreams on X. They say they have strong skills in broadcasting, video editing, and using Artificial Intelligence (AI), and that they create Star Atlas content with great passion.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say they already spend a lot of time on Star Atlas and enjoy playing every part of the game, especially UE5. They also say they participate in z.ink events and other activities as much as they can. If selected, they say they will try to be even more active and consistent. They do not give a fixed weekly number, explaining that they engage whenever they are available—sometimes 2–3 hours a day, sometimes 7–8 hours, and sometimes more.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They say Web3 gaming needs broader momentum and believe Star Atlas can go much further when that upswing comes. They say project updates like C4, Holosim, and UE5 patches are very important. They consider Iris Bounty and DAO Casters to be good initiatives. They also say Star Atlas content is currently limited to a few platforms like X, YouTube, and Medium, and believe using more platforms would increase reach and engagement. They say they have started using YouTube Shorts and TikTok to reach a wider audience, and also think Instagram could help.

**Additional Notes** 
* They say there is a lack of Turkish resources, so they mainly focus on producing and sharing Turkish content for the Turkish community. They say their spoken English is not strong, so they avoid voice communication, but they can understand and reply in writing. They also say they try to add English subtitles when content is in Turkish, and Turkish subtitles when content is in English, to reach a broader global audience. 

**Work Samples / Portfolio** 
* They say that once they committed to creating content, they made a 20-part Star Atlas UE5 video series and posted daily to show consistency and what they can do.
* https://x.com/sakaleynx/status/1947016000802632006?s=20

---

### AlicesArcade

**Social Links/Primary Link** 
* https://x.com/AnekoGameFi  
* https://x.com/NyxBunny8199  
* https://x.com/mmmidnightmeow  
* https://x.com/momile55555  
* https://x.com/karlishgg  
* https://x.com/Skylarangel__  
* https://x.com/anyaya_eth  
* https://x.com/Shimal2i_eth  
* https://x.com/nikkimetv

**POLIS Voting Power**
* 568,908

**Motivation for Applying** 
* They say they are excited about the chance to become Star Atlas DAO Casters. As **Alice’s Angels** (www.aliceangels.net), they want to bring vibrant energy, fresh creative content, and the spirit of female gamers into Star Atlas. They want to attract new players, create excitement across the community, and bring more fun and freshness to make Star Atlas feel like an even more irresistible adventure.

**Relevant Experience & Platforms** 
* They describe Alice’s Angels as a team of female creators with experience in content, marketing, and community building. They say they delivered the “Alice Angels x Star Atlas Summer” collaboration and promoted Star Atlas activities to boost visibility and engagement. They say their founder, Alice in Cryptoland, is a dedicated Star Atlas supporter who has collaborations with major brands like Ledger, Sandbox, and others via Alice’s Arcade. They say Aneko has organized offline and online events in Thailand and achieved first place in the Shaga x Star Atlas campaign. They say they have solid marketing expertise, creative skills, and genuine love for Star Atlas, and are ready to help elevate the ecosystem.

**Estimated Weekly Time Commitment** 
* They say that during the Star Atlas Summer collaboration, the team collectively dedicated 2–3 hours per day (about 14–21 hours per week) to creating and sharing high-quality content. They plan to rotate among 9 Angels over the 6-month term to keep the work fresh and sustainable. If elected, they say they will commit the same amount of time or more each week to drive engagement, create awareness, and support Star Atlas.

**Ideas to Grow the DAO** 
* They say Star Atlas has made strong progress in product development since 2021 and that the community is a major strength. They believe it is a smart strategy for the DAO to expand marketing while the core team focuses on building the product. To accelerate growth, they recommend stronger targeted promotions, strategic PR campaigns, and creative partnerships to raise awareness with both Web2 gamers and Web3 audiences. They also believe fun and relatable content—such as collaborations with female creators and influencers—can help bridge audiences and bring in new waves of players. 

**Additional Notes** 
* Not mentioned.
